notes:
Ember 1.7.0 — Push-to-talk voice (zero-latency, offline Whisper)

• Push-to-talk: hold a key, talk, release — Ember transcribes and sends it instantly. No 'Hey Ember' wake-word wait and no false triggers. Set it up in Settings → Voice (default key F9, off until you enable it).
• Local, private transcription with Whisper when installed (pip install faster-whisper) — fully offline; otherwise it uses your Gemini key or free Google speech. Pick the engine + Whisper model size in Settings.

Builds on 1.6.0 (smarter local Ollama, chat-title model picker, phone quick-actions) and the Norton-style Security Dashboard.
